return(function(r,b,q,F,B,T,v,Y,j,y,l,Q,N,V,S,k,D,H,A,m,e,z,M)y,H,Y,S,N,M,V,j,Q,A,z,m,D,e,l,k=function(r,Z)local b=Q(Z)local q=function(q)return Y(r,{q},Z,b)end return q end,function(r,Z)local sZ,f,m,rZ,G,VZ,iZ,HZ,NZ,jZ,X,Br,LZ,L,JZ,QZ,RZ,P,bZ,kZ,hZ,h,R,TZ,pZ,a,i,x,YZ,v,EZ,Dr,OZ,aZ,O,g,n,k,C,uZ,tZ,XZ,oZ,AZ,U,zZ,E,rr,MZ,UZ,vZ,kr,br,c,S,o,mZ,BZ,wZ,WZ,qr,dZ,J,gZ,I,lZ,s,cZ,vr,d,Fr,p,KZ,er,CZ,u,fZ,xZ,w,N,K,Yr,PZ,yZ,SZ,Zr,nZ,Tr,qZ,Qr,mr,FZ,GZ,ZZ,eZ,Q,t,W,IZ,DZ end end end end end Y=#B return b(v)end,function(r,Z)local b=Q(Z)local q=function(...)return Y(r,{...},Z,b)end return q end,function(r)local Z,Y=-82698-(-82699),r[-268584-(-268585)]while Y do q end,function(r,Z)local b=Q(Z)local q=function(q,F,B,T,v,D)return Y(r,{q;F,B,T;v;D},Z,b)end return q end,function(r,Z)local b=Q(Z)local q=function(q,F,B,T,v)return Y(r,{q;F,B,T;v},Z,b)end return q end,function(r)for Z=-76818+76819,#r,135575+-135574 do m[r[Z]]=(578738-578737)+m[r[Z]]end if q then local Y=q(true)local
